title: Update docs/initialization.md — Matcha user journey + Shadow Mirroring chapter + MCP client compatibility matrix
description: Update docs/initialization.md to document the Shadow Mirroring architecture and Matcha (Check-not-Ask) user experience. Add: (1) Matcha interaction example with Phase 0/1/2 walkthrough using werewolf-minigame-stub as concrete scenario; (2) HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence tiers explanation and user correction flow; (3) Shadow Mirroring architecture chapter with .fabric/agents/ directory structure diagram + _cross/ rule set examples; (4) MCP client compatibility matrix (Claude Code / Cursor with MCP / Codex / Gemini CLI / etc) with explicit 'Fabric requires MCP-capable client' declaration; (5) migration guide from colocated AGENTS.md to .fabric/agents/. Can start early and update iteratively; final version should be written after TASK-002 SKILL.md is stable.

files.change: Add Phase 0/1/2 Matcha interaction example using werewolf stub; show HIGH default-accept flow and MEDIUM explicit confirm flow. Add Shadow Mirroring chapter: .fabric/agents/ directory tree example, _cross/ purpose, zero business-dir rule files principle. Add MCP client compatibility matrix. Add migration guide section. Update any Phase 1/2/3 references to match new Phase 0/1/2 naming.

implementation: Read docs/initialization.md in full to understand current structure before modifying
Draft Matcha interaction example: Phase 0 (reading forensic.json candidate_files), Phase 1 (single-screen batch Check with confidence icons), Phase 2 (auto-construct writing to .fabric/agents/)
Draft HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence explanation: thresholds, implicit vs explicit accept, user correction syntax examples
Draft Shadow Mirroring chapter: ASCII directory tree showing .fabric/agents/ mirror structure, _cross/ subtree example, explanation of why business dirs have zero rule files
Draft MCP client compatibility matrix table: clients, MCP support, fab_get_rules availability, recommended usage
Draft migration guide: numbered steps from colocated AGENTS.md to .fabric/agents/ topology
Write all new sections into initialization.md; update existing Phase references if needed

reference.examples: conclusions.json recommendations[5].steps provides specific doc update items: werewolf sample Architecture Review, HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW flow, @import and .fabric/ directory structure examples

criteria: docs/initialization.md contains a Phase 0/1/2 Matcha interaction example using werewolf-minigame-stub
Example covers both HIGH implicit accept scenario and MEDIUM explicit confirmation scenario
Shadow Mirroring chapter present with .fabric/agents/ directory tree example showing root.md + assets/ mirror + _cross/ subtree
Chapter explicitly states: business directories contain ZERO rule files
MCP client compatibility matrix present with ≥ 4 clients listed; includes 'Fabric requires MCP-capable client' statement
Migration guide present with concrete steps from colocated AGENTS.md to .fabric/agents/ topology
Existing Phase 1/2/3 references updated to Phase 0/1/2 naming consistent with TASK-002 SKILL.md rewrite

rationale.chosen_approach: Update existing docs/initialization.md rather than creating a new doc; add new sections without removing existing content that remains valid
alternatives_considered: Create separate shadow-mirroring.md doc (duplicates initialization context; fragmentation)
Rewrite initialization.md from scratch (breaks existing user links and references)
decision_factors: initialization.md is the authoritative fab init user guide
Shadow Mirroring is a topology change within initialization, not a separate workflow
Migration guide must live alongside the initialization doc to be discoverable
rationale.tradeoffs: Doc update can start early (TASK-008 has no hard schema dependencies) but final examples should reference stable SKILL.md behavior from TASK-002

manual_checks: Read docs/initialization.md after update; verify all convergence criteria sections are present
Verify Matcha example shows realistic werewolf assertions with confidence icons
Verify directory tree shows .fabric/agents/ with root.md + assets/ mirror + _cross/ structure
success_metrics: All 7 convergence criteria sections present in updated doc
No orphaned Phase 1/2/3 references (old 3-round naming) remaining in the doc

risks.description: Doc written before TASK-002 SKILL.md finalized may describe Phase 1 display format incorrectly
risks.mitigation: Write structural sections (Shadow Mirroring chapter, compatibility matrix, migration guide) first; write Matcha interaction example after TASK-002 is complete
risks.fallback: Mark Phase 0/1/2 example section as 'preview' until TASK-002 is merged
